ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Proof That Estate Funds Are Properly Protected By Fdic Insurance
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Lazar for Dennis Smith (Petitioner/Administrator).

Mr. Lazar stated that shortly after the last hearing the remaining estate property sold for an additional $650,000.00, that the Administrator has worked on distributing the funds to seven banks and that they now received correspondence from Merrill Lynch that assures that they will be able to federally insurance multiple accounts over the $250,000.00 amount and that they have distributed amounts to several banks. The Court advised Counsel that a further hearing may be required. Status on filing of proof that estate funds are properly protected by FDIC insurance is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Lazar is to file a declaration by November 20, 2019.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vanessa Sundin for Petitioner

Ms. Sundin stated the house in Oakland will be closing escrow tomorrow, she has worked with the Executor, and anticipate filing the petition for final distribution in the near future. Ms. Sundin further stated that she told her client to open account with different institutions for full FDIC, and request 1 year for final. The Court inquired if 6 months is enough, and Ms. Sundin agreed.

The Petition to Approve Report of Status of Administration, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: T. Jackson. Not reported.
